column1: # Shared by Go (internal/wire) and Java (com.virogg.hbasecop.bridge.wire) cross-language tests.
# Lines starting with '#' or blank are ignored. Field separator is '|'.
# Columns: name | type | req_id | region | hook | payload_kind | payload | chunk_size
#   HEX        - 'payload' is lower-case hex of the literal payload bytes
#   ASCENDING  - 'payload' is the decimal byte length; bytes are (i % 251) for i in [0,n)
# chunk_size = 0 means default (WireFormat.MAX_PAYLOAD_BYTES); >0 overrides for compact multi-chunk fixtures.
